_publications._publicationTitle: Gene expression analysis identifies potential biomarkers of neurofibromatosis type 1 including adrenomedullin.

_contextSnippet: 132 were similarly upregulated in both neurofibroma-derived Schwann cell cultures and primary tumors and secreted or predicted to be secreted from the Secreted Protein Database, after imposing a P value of 0.001
